context_for_next_testing_agent: v4.0 features fully tested and working. ML Prediction has 4 prediction types (network, process, file, user) using real ML models (Isolation Forest, Naive Bayes, Neural Network). Sandbox Analysis simulates malware analysis with 10 signatures. Browser Isolation provides URL analysis and session management with 4 isolation modes. Kibana Dashboards has 6 pre-built security dashboards exportable as NDJSON. All previous v3.0 endpoints continue to work.
